theme_and_archetype.archetype: Soft Utility (Archetype 3) mixed with Swiss Data Clarity (Archetype 4)
theme_and_archetype.emotional_tone: Calm, focused, frictionless, and highly organized.

typography.strategy: The Anti-Default Rule. We bypass generic Inter/Roboto for distinct, premium sans-serifs.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (E1 standard). Containers must have p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Control Room Grid (density, clarity, scanability).
layout_and_spacing.structure: Sidebar for themes/fonts settings (col-span-1), Main area for tasks (col-span-3) for desktop.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Combination of soft shadow cards (shadow-sm, rounded-xl) for main sections, and flat list items with bottom borders (border-b) for tasks to ensure maximum legibility.

components_strategy.task_input: Shadcn Form/Input customized. Flat style, no harsh borders, subtle focus ring (ring-2 ring-primary/20).
components_strategy.task_list: HTML semantic list. Each task is a flex row. Hover effect: slight translate-x (translate-x-1) and background tint.
components_strategy.task_completion: Shadcn Checkbox, slightly enlarged (h-5 w-5), smooth color transition.
components_strategy.task_edit_modal: Shadcn Dialog. Glassmorphism backdrop (backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/40). Clean card inside with p-8.
components_strategy.reminder_system: Shadcn Popover + Calendar for date picking. Small bell icon next to task name if reminder exists.
components_strategy.upcoming_indicator: A glowing dot (relative flex h-3 w-3) or an accent left-border (border-l-4 border-amber-500) for tasks due within 24h.
components_strategy.data_testid: MANDATORY on all buttons, inputs, toggles (e.g., data-testid='task-complete-checkbox', data-testid='theme-selector').

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must shift visually. Buttons: slight lift (-translate-y-px) and shadow-sm.
motion_and_interactions.list_animations: Staggered entrance for tasks using Framer Motion (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0, staggerChildren: 0.1).
motion_and_interactions.completion: Strike-through animation (width 0 to 100%) and text fade (opacity-50) when task is checked.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react for all standard icons (Bell, Check, Trash, Settings, Calendar, Clock).

empty_state_light.description: Calm abstract minimal background for light/dark theme empty states

empty_state_green.description: Macro green leaf abstract for nature theme empty states

instructions_to_main_agent: Build 'Today Task' as a React app using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI components.
Implement the 4 requested themes (Light, Dark, Corporate Blue, Nature Green) using CSS variables mapped to Tailwind classes.
Implement a font switcher that toggles between the 3 defined font options (Modern, Classic Clean, Technical). Override global styles dynamically.
Use Framer Motion for smooth task list entrance and completion animations.
For task storage, use the browser's localStorage API.
Ensure the 'Upcoming Task Indicator' prominently highlights tasks due soon with the defined reminder_indicator color.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings; use the E1 specified fonts (Outfit, Work Sans, IBM Plex Sans).
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
